response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed on-screen text 'チャイナアドバイス' (China Advice) and '作詞・作曲：真部 脩一' (Lyrics/Composition: Shuichi Manabe). 2. Observed on-screen text '春茶' (Harucha) during the song performance. 3. Simplified search string to '"チャイナアドバイス" "真部 脩一" Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found lyrics from multiple sources (e.g., j-lyric.net). Compiled the lyrics and translation.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue skit followed by a musical performance of "China Advice" (チャイナアドバイス) by the VTuber Harucha (春茶).

scenes.description: Musical performance of 'China Advice' by Harucha. The text on-screen confirms the song title and composer.
